scripts.test: node tests/test_utils.js && node tests/test_actions.js && node test_logic.js && node tests/stats-integration.test.js && node tests/test_heatmap.js
scripts.train-langmodel: node tools/train-langmodel.js tests/test_kantine_menuCache.json .omo/seed_tmp.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const j=fs.readFileSync('.omo/seed_tmp.json','utf8'); fs.writeFileSync('src/lang/langModelSeed.js', '// GENERATED by tools/train-langmodel.js\nexport const LANG_MODEL_SEED = ' + j + ';\n'); fs.unlinkSync('.omo/seed_tmp.json'); console.log('Seed updated.');"
